data.name: ADDQS_ALERT_MSG_COMBO_CATEGORY
data.value: Specify the number of choices within 1 to 1000.

data.name: ADDQS_COUNT_LONG_LABEL
data.value: Count: Restrict base to the respondents that selected the choice specified below

data.name: ADDQS_ERROR_MSG_EMPTY_VARIABLE
data.value: A variable name is not input.

data.name: ADDQS_VARIABLE_ALREADY_EXIST
data.value: A variable with the input name already exists.

data.name: ADD_DP_RECODE_ERROR_MSG_NO_CHOICE_SET
data.value: No choices are set for New variable.

data.name: ADD_DP_RECODE_ERROR_MSG_NO_MATCH_NUMBER_OF_CHOICES
data.value: Match "Number of choices" and the number of "choice" for New variable.

data.name: ALERT_CLEAR_SETTING_FOR_CHOICES
data.value: Clear the setting for choices and others and set them again. Continue?

data.name: ALERT_DELETE_DATA_PROCESSING
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: ALERT_DELETE_FROM_QS_DATA_PROCESSING
data.value: The variable you are deleting may be used in the following features. Continuing with the deletion will delete following settings related to a variable to be deleted. Data Processing GT Tables Cross Tabulation / Charts FA list Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: ALERT_EXECUTE_DP_OR_DELET_VAR
data.value: Execute the data processing or delete the new variable in the question setting.

data.name: ALERT_FS_SAME_TOGETHER
data.value: Cannot select [No Answer] and [Excluded] at the same time.

data.name: ALERT_REPEAT_RECODE
data.value: Clear the checkbox for "Repeats" and change.

data.name: ALERT_UNDO_DATA_PROCESSING
data.value: Restore the raw data back to the state before data processing. Continue?

data.name: ALERT_UN_PROCESSED_VARIABLE_EXIST
data.value: Not executed some data processing entries to set new variables' value. Continue ?

data.name: AUT_MSG_CHANGE_FAIL
data.value: Invalid activation key OR The Registry contain invalid activation key

data.name: AUT_MSG_PRO_STD
data.value: Do you want to change Pro to Std?

data.name: AUT_MSG_STD_PRO
data.value: Do you want to change Std to Pro?

data.name: AUT_WANT_TO_DEL
data.value: Are you sure to delete the Key?

data.name: CB_ITEM_02_MA_COMMA_SEPERATED
data.value: MA Comma Separated in a Cell

data.name: CLOSE_DP_WARNING_MESSAGE
data.value: Data processing has not been completed. Close data processing ?

data.name: COMBO_VALUE_INCELLCOMMASEPERATOR
data.value: MA Comma Separated in a Cell

data.name: COMPUTE_ERROR_MSG_CHANGE_VARIABLE_NAME
data.value: Types of the new variable and the source variable must be the same

data.name: COMPUTE_MSG_INVALID_VARIABLE
data.value: Variables with answer type other than [SA] or [N] cannot be set in an expression.

data.name: COMPUTE_TOOLTIP_INSERTBTN
data.value: Insert selected source variable name in to the formula.

data.name: CONFIRMATION_BOX_CONTENT_TEXT
data.value: Are you sure to save the data?

data.name: CONFIRMATION_BOX_CONTENT_TEXT1
data.value: Do you want to execute Data Import?

data.name: COPY_ERROR_MSG
data.value: You can't paste this here because the Copy area and Paste area aren't the same size.

data.name: CROSS_BTM_LABL
data.value: Criterion Variable to Divide Output : ON

data.name: CROSS_CLASSIFICATION_ITEM
data.value: Criterion Variable to Divide Output : ON

data.name: CROSS_DELETE_MSG
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: CROSS_DISPLAY_NO_ANSWER
data.value: Display unanswered items to be tabulated

data.name: CROSS_MESSAGE_BOX_MULTI
data.value: Only one item can be selected

data.name: CROSS_MESSAGE_BOX_N
data.value: Cannot select a variable for the answer type of [N]

data.name: CROSS_MESSAGE_BOX_REMOVED
data.value: Removed the variable for the answer type [N]

data.name: CROSS_MSGBOX_NTYPE
data.value: An N type variable is set in axis 1

data.name: CROSS_MSG_BOX_CHECK_PAR
data.value: All significance levels for the significance test has been set.

data.name: CROSS_MSG_UNCHECK_PAR
data.value: Specify one or two significance level(s) for statistical test.

data.name: CROSS_OUTPUT_SETTING
data.value: Output one table for one matrix

data.name: CROSS_OUTPUT_TABLE_FOR_ONE
data.value: Output one table for one matrix

data.name: CROSS_TOOLTIP_WEIGHT_BACK
data.value: Calculate weight values for sample weighting.

data.name: CR_PROCESS_RUNNING
data.value: Some process is still running in other instances.Please wait for the process to be completed

data.name: DATA_TOP_BOX_TEXT
data.value: Can browse answers from each respondent. Cannot edit values directly.

data.name: DI_MSG_002
data.value: Column already allocated for flag format

data.name: DI_MSG_007
data.value: Delimitter and string quotes cannot be same

data.name: DI_MSG_010
data.value: File with same name is already opened

data.name: DI_MSG_011
data.value: No data avaiable in File 1 to continue

data.name: DI_MSG_013
data.value: Column : {0} - Item name cannot be blank

data.name: DI_MSG_014
data.value: Column : {0} - Variable name cannot be duplicated

data.name: DI_MSG_015
data.value: Column : {0} - Invalid characters in variable name

data.name: DI_MSG_016
data.value: Column : {0} - No of choices cannot be blank

data.name: DI_MSG_017
data.value: Column : {0} - Number of choices not matching with the choice wordings

data.name: DI_MSG_018
data.value: Column : {0} - Number of choices cannot be less than or equal to 0

data.name: DI_MSG_019
data.value: Column : {0} - Data mismatch between column values and choice wordings

data.name: DI_MSG_020
data.value: Column : {0} - Invalid number in column value

data.name: DI_MSG_021
data.value: Column : {0} - SA value should be numeric and cannot be zero

data.name: DI_MSG_022
data.value: Column : {0} - SA value cannot be greater than number of choices

data.name: DI_MSG_024
data.value: Column : {0} - MA value should be either 0 or 1

data.name: DI_MSG_026
data.value: Column : {0} - MA value should be numeric only

data.name: DI_MSG_027
data.value: Column already allocated for flag format

data.name: DO_ALERT_CHOICE_MORETHAN_600
data.value: Following question having more than 600 choices {0}

data.name: DO_ALERT_NO_DATA_FOUND
data.value: A question for the variable name {0} is not included.

data.name: DO_DIV_WARNING
DO_NO_DATA_ALERT
data.value: Cannot execute because there is no data.

data.name: DO_OUTPUT_CHECK_NEW_VARIABLE
data.value: Not-executed data processing entries to set new variables' value. Continue?

data.name: DO_OUTPUT_NEW_VARIABLE
data.value: Execute the data processing or delete the new variable in the question setting

data.name: DP_TOP_BOX_TEXT2
data.value: Specify conditions and details for modification or processing of raw data.

data.name: ERR_MGS_COUNT_SET_VALUE_LOWER_LIMIT_LESS_THAN_UPPER_LIMIT
data.value: Set value for the lower limit less than the upper limit

data.name: ERR_MSG_CLASS_INPUT_EITHER_LOWER_OR_UPPER_LIMIT
data.value: Input a value for either the lower or upper limit.

data.name: ERR_MSG_CROSS_MARKING_DIFFERENCE
data.value: Details of the difference between percentages for marking are not set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_CROSS_PATH_NULL
data.value: Specify a folder to save divided outputs in.

data.name: ERR_MSG_CROSS_SIGNIFICANCE_CHECK_ALL
data.value: Significance levels could be set up to 2 levels

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAEXPORT_FILTER_VALIDATION_VARIABLE
data.value: A variable to be processed is not set

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAEXPORT_SET_NUMERIC
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. "<", "<=", ">", "> =" Cannot be specified as "a, b", "a / b", "a-b", "a-", or "-a".

data.name: ERR_MSG_DATAPROCESS_VALIDATION_ERROR_NOT_SET
data.value: is not set properly or the answer type is invalid when a variable is set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_DELETE_NON_NUMERICAL_VALUES_EXIST_IN_THE_DATA
data.value: Non-numerical values exist in the data.

data.name: ERR_MSG_DELETE_THE_NUMBER_OF_CASES_CAN_BE_READ_AT_A_TIME_EXCEEDS
data.value: The number of cases that can be read at a time is up to {0}. Cannot read the file.

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INCORRECT_VALUE
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. * and DK only applied to "=" and "<>" operator

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INCORRECT_VALUE_AGAINST_OP
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. "<", "<=", ">", "> =","<>" Cannot be specified as "!a".

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INCORRECT_VALUE_AGAINST_OP2
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. "<", "<=", ">", "> =","<>" Cannot be specified as "!a".

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INVALID_VALUE
data.value: Criteria variable : input of [{0}] is invalid.

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INVALID_VARIABLE_VALUE
data.value: The value of a variable for [Answer type] is (SA) , (FA) , (N) can only be set with a variable for [Answer type] is (SA) , (FA) , (N).

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INVALID_VARIABLE_VALUE1
data.value: The value of a variable for [Answer type] is (MA) can only be set with a variable for [Answer type] is (MA).

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INVALID_VARIABLE_VALUE2
data.value: The value of a variable for [Answer type] is (MA) can only be set with a variable for [Answer type] is (MA).

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_INVALID_VARIABLE_VALUE3
data.value: The value of a variable for [Answer type] is (FA) can only be set with a variable for [Answer type] is (SA) , (FA), (N).

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_NOT_OP
data.value: Criteria variable : input of [{0}] is invalid. Set a numeric value.

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_NOT_OPERATOR_DUPLICATED
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. [!] cannot be set elsewhere than at start.

data.name: ERR_MSG_FILTER_CRITERIA_VARIABLE_MISSING
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. A blank is set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CANNOT_SET_ALONE
data.value: Criteria variable:input of [{0}] is invalid. [!] cannot be set alone.

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CANNOT_SET_ELSEWHERE_THAN_AT_START
data.value: [{0}] cannot be set elsewhere than at start.

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CHOICECOUNT_NOT_MATCH_WITH_CHOICES
data.value: Match "{0}" and the number of "{1}" for New variable.

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CHOICE_COUNT_EXCEED_LIMIT
data.value: Input [(Auto)] or [1-1000] for the [No. of choices].

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CHOICE_INVALID_VALUE
data.value: Input [(Auto)] or [1-1000] for the [No. of choices].

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CONFIRMATION_ITEM_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS
data.value: A variable with the input name already exists.

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_CONFIRMATION_RENAME_NEW_VARIABLE_AUTOMATICALLY
data.value: Do you want to automatically rename the variable?

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_SET_INTEGER_RANGE_OF
data.value: Set an integer in the range of [{0}-{1}].

data.name: ERR_MSG_INTEGRATE_SET_LOWER_LIMIT_LESS_THAN_UPPER_LIMIT
data.value: Set the value for the lower limit less than the upper limit.

data.name: ERR_MSG_LDEL_SAMPLEID_DOESNOT_EXIST
data.value: The specified SAMPLEID does not exist.

data.name: ERR_MSG_NO_EXECUTABLE_ENTRIES
data.value: Not found executable data processing entries

data.name: ERR_MSG_QUESTION_LENGTH_EXCEED
data.value: Specify New variable name with {0} or less characters.

data.name: ERR_MSG_RECODE_CANNOT_SET_ELSEWHERE_THAN_AT_START
data.value: [!] cannot be set elsewhere than at start.

data.name: ERR_MSG_RECODE_SET_AN_INTEGER_IN_THE_RANGE_OF
data.value: Set an integer in the range of [{0}-{1}].

data.name: ERR_MSG_WEIGHTING_MISSING
data.value: Base Variable for weighting: input of [{0}] is invalid. A blank is set.

data.name: ERR_MSG_WEIGHTING_VALIDATION
data.value: Base variable for weighting:input of[{0}] is invalid.A blank is set

data.name: EXCLUDE_TITLE_TEXT
data.value: Modify the variable to [Excluded] when the specified criteria are met

data.name: EX_FILE_USED_OTHER
data.value: File Used by some other process

data.name: EX_PROGRESSBAR_FINISHING
data.value: data export will complete in a short while

data.name: FA_LABEL_ASCENDING_ORDER
data.value: Sort additional variables in ascending order

data.name: FA_RLIST_EMPTY
data.value: An FA row to edit does not exist.

data.name: FILE_OPEN_COMPLETE
data.value: Will complete opening a file shortly.

data.name: FILE_USED_ANOTHER_PROCESS
data.value: Temporary files are being used by other processes. Close it and try again.

data.name: FILTER_CRITERIA_MSG1
data.value: Base variable ({0}) is set to divide output.

data.name: GTMTMGraph
data.value: M Bar Chart,M Column Chart,Bar Chart,Column Chart

data.name: GTMTSGraph
data.value: 100 pct Stacked bar chart,100 pct Stacked column chart,M Pie Chart

data.name: GTRATGraph
data.value: Pie RAT Chart,RAT Bar Chart,RAT Column Chart

data.name: GTSAGraph
data.value: Pie Chart,100 pct Stacked bar chart,100 pct Stacked column chart,Bar Chart,Column Chart

data.name: GTSA_WARNING_CHOICE_EXCEEDED
data.value: A variable with more than 255 categories cannot be set as a stub.

data.name: GT_EMPTY
data.value: Tabulation item has not been set

data.name: GT_INFO_COPY
data.value: Copy selected item to create a new one.

data.name: GT_INFO_DELETE
data.value: Delete selected item(s) from the list.

data.name: GT_INFO_INITIALIZE
data.value: Clear and set tabulation list. New items will also be shown.

data.name: GT_INFO_ONOFF
data.value: Switch on/off the tabulation of selected item(s).

data.name: GT_INVALID_ITEM_SETTINGS_IN_ROW
data.value: Invalid tabulation item setting is set in row {0}

data.name: GT_MSG_001
data.value: Significance levels could be set up to 2 levels

data.name: GT_MSG_002
data.value: Tabulation item has not been set

data.name: GT_MSG_006
data.value: Cannot set because of no data for [{0}]. Perform data processing.

data.name: GT_MSG_007
data.value: Some data processing entries to set new variables are not executed.\nContinue?

data.name: GT_MSG_008
data.value: Execute the data processing or delete the new variable in the question setting

data.name: GT_NO_WEIGHTING
data.value: The weighting variable has not been set.

data.name: GT_SAMPLE_WEIGHT_NO_DATA
data.value: Cannot set because of no data for [{0}]. Perform data processing.

data.name: GT_SEPECIFY_SIGNTEST_LEVEL
data.value: Specify one or two significance level(s) for statistical test

data.name: GT_STATISTICAL_TEST_DIFF
data.value: Test for the difference between choices

data.name: GT_STATISTICAL_TEST_DIFF_MATRIX
data.value: Test for the difference between variables (Matrix Only)

data.name: GT_TABULATION_DELETE
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: GT_TABULATION_FILTER
data.value: Criterion Variable to Divide Output : ON

data.name: GT_VALIDATION_SIGNTEST_MAX
data.value: Significance levels could be set up to 2 levels

data.name: GT_VALIDATION_SIGNTEST_MIN
data.value: Specify one or two significance level(s) for statistical test.

data.name: GT_WARNING_CHOICE_EXCEEDED
data.value: A graph for a matrix question with more than 200 choices cannot be output.

data.name: IM_MSG_BLANK_CHOICES
data.value: Column : {0} No of choices cannot be blank

data.name: IM_MSG_CHOICE_MISSMATCH
data.value: Column : {0} Data mismatch between column values and choice wordings

data.name: IM_MSG_CHOICE_NOT_MATCH
data.value: Column : {0} Number of choices not matching with choice wordings

data.name: IM_MSG_CHOICE_NOT_ZERO
data.value: Column : {0} Number of choices cannot be less than or equal to 0

data.name: IM_MSG_FILE_ALREADY_OPEN
data.value: File with same name is already opened

data.name: IM_MSG_IMPORT_DUPLICATE
data.value: The key for file 2 is duplicated

data.name: IM_MSG_INVALID_CHARACTERS
data.value: Column : {0} Invalid characters in variable name

data.name: IM_MSG_INVALID_COLUMN_VALUE
data.value: Column : {0} Invalid number in column value

data.name: IM_MSG_INVALID_MA_VALUE
data.value: Column : {0} MA value should be either 0 or 1

data.name: IM_MSG_INVALID_SA_VALUE
data.value: Column : {0} SA value should be numeric and cannot be zero

data.name: IM_MSG_INVALID_WARN
data.value: Delimitter and string quotes cannot be same

data.name: IM_MSG_ITEM_BLANCK
data.value: Column : {0} Item name cannot be blank

data.name: IM_MSG_ITEM_DUPLICATED
data.value: Column : {0} Variable name cannot be duplicated

data.name: IM_MSG_MA_NOT_GRATERTHAN_CHOICE
data.value: Column : {0} MA value cannot be greater than number of choices

data.name: IM_MSG_MA_SHOULD_NUMERIC
data.value: Column : {0} MA value should be numeric only

data.name: IM_MSG_NO_DATA
data.value: No data avaiable in File 1 to continue

data.name: IM_MSG_SA_NOT_GRATERTHAN_CHOICE
data.value: Column : {0} SA value cannot be greater than number of choices

data.name: IM_MSG_WARNING_ALLOCATE_COL
data.value: Column already allocated for flag format

data.name: INFO_CROSS_SHEET_MSG_BASE_VARIABLE_SET
data.value: Base variable({0}) is set to divide output

data.name: LABEL_ANNOTATION_INTEGRATE
data.value: Combine the conditions of the source variables 1 to 5 to create a new one. E.g., create a new variable (by sex/age) from the original ones (by sex and age).

data.name: LABEL_ANNOTATION_JOINT
data.value: Combine multiple variables (SA/MA) in series to create a new one (MA). E.g., use to join multiple questions to make a variable.

data.name: LABEL_ANNOTATION_MCONVERT
data.value: Convert the same choices of multiple variables into one MA variable. E.g., Convert variables in a source matrix question to choices for a new variable.

data.name: LABEL_CHECK_AFTER_UNFALL
data.value: Exclude when all the source variables are [Excluded]

data.name: LABEL_ClASS
data.value: Convert a numeric source variable (answer type N) into a new categorical variable (answer type SA). E.g., use to convert the age category to 10s, 20s, 30s etc.

data.name: LABEL_COMPUTE
data.value: Perform four arithmetic operations on the source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N).

data.name: LABEL_DATA_PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION
data.value: * Previously processed data will be overwritten.

data.name: LABEL_PROCESSING_METHOD_INTEGRATE
data.value: Create a new variable combining multiple source variables.

data.name: LABEL_PROCESSING_METHOD_JOINT
data.value: Bind multiple variables into one MA variable.

data.name: LABEL_PROCESSING_METHOD_MCONVERT
data.value: Convert the same choices of multiple variables into one MA variable.

data.name: LABEL_RECODE
data.value: Recode the choices of a source variable into a new one. E.g., recode "5-year-old interval" (SA/8 choices) to "10-year-old interval" (SA/4 choices).

data.name: LABEL_UNWEIGHT_BACKED_BASE
data.value: Refer to unweighted cases as marking criteria

data.name: LABLE_CREATED_PROCESS_INSTRUCTION
data.value: Created process will be displayed in the following list

data.name: LBL_ADD_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Add up multiple SA/MA variables with the same choices into one MA variable.

data.name: LBL_COLUMN_SELECTION_SPECIFY
data.value: Specify the data to be imported. Excel reads only the first sheet for import.

data.name: LBL_COMBINE_SIDEWAYS
data.value: Match two qc files horizontally to create one qc file. Only closed files can be selected.

data.name: LBL_COMBINE_VERTICAL
data.value: Match two qc files vertically to create one qc file. Only closed files can be selected.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_ADD_DESC
data.value: Add up multiple SA/MA variables with the same choices into one MA variable.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_ADD_PROCESS
data.value: Add or roll SA or MA up to MA.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_AVG_DESC
data.value: Calculate the average (mean) value of source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N)

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_AVG_METHOD
data.value: Calculate the average of the numeric variables.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_COUNT_DESC
data.value: Count the number of selected choices for the choice variable (answer type MA) to create a new variable (answer type N/SA)

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_MAX_DESC
data.value: Calculate the maximum value of source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N)

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_MAX_METHOD
data.value: Calculate the maximum value of a numeric variable.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_MIN_DESC
data.value: Calculate the minimum value of source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N)

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_MIN_METHOD
data.value: Calculate the minimum value of a numeric variable.

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_MTOS
data.value: Convert an MA source variable into a new SA variable

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_SUM_DESC
data.value: Calculate the total of source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N)

data.name: LBL_COMMAND_SUM_METHOD
data.value: Calculate the sum of the numeric variables.

data.name: LBL_COUNT_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Count the number of choices selected in an MA variable.

data.name: LBL_CREATE_QC4
data.value: Create qc4 file from Qlayout and Qrawdata files.

data.name: LBL_DELETE_CASES_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Delete cases that meet the specified condition.

data.name: LBL_DELIMITTER_SPECIFY
data.value: Specify the character code of data, delimiters, etc. The first line is recognized as a title line.

data.name: LBL_EXTERNAL_DATA
data.value: Add other files to qc4 file. It can be matched horizontally.

data.name: LBL_GROUP_DESC
data.value: Calculate the maximum value of source variables (answer type N/SA) to create a new variable (answer type N)

data.name: LBL_GROUP_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Calculate the maximum, minimum, average and sum value of a numeric variable.

data.name: LBL_IMPORTED_INFORMATION_SPECIFY
data.value: Set the information of imported data. When setting MA in flag format, set in the first column.

data.name: LBL_INTEGRATE_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Create a new variable combining multiple source variables.

data.name: LBL_ISNOTPROCESSED_DESCRIPTION
data.value: The numbers represent the number of hits.

data.name: LBL_ISPROCESSED_DESCRIPTION
data.value: The numbers represent the number of hits. If data processing has already been performed, the number on the top is displayed after processing and the number on the bottom is before processing.

data.name: LBL_JOINT_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Bind multiple variables into one MA variable.

data.name: LBL_MCONVERT_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Convert the same choices of multiple variables into one MA variable.

data.name: LBL_MTOS_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Convert an MA variable into an SA variable.

data.name: LBL_OUTPUT_LIST_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Output a list of answers of respondents that meet the criteria.

data.name: LBL_RECODE_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Reassigns the choices for SA / MA answers.

data.name: LBL_SCREEN_MATCH
data.value: Match SCR Qlayout data and Qraw data with qc data

data.name: LISTUP_TITLE_TEXT
data.value: Output the answers to the specified variables of respondents that meet the criteria

data.name: MAIN_MSG_APP_RESET
data.value: QuickCross4 did not shut down properly last time. Resetting the app…

data.name: MCONVERT_NEW_QUESTION_CHOICE_VALIDATION
data.value: Numbers of choices for the new variable and for the source variable must be the same

data.name: MCONVERT_NEW_QUESTION_CHOICE_VALIDATION_WITH_ENTRY_VARIABLES
data.value: Select a variable with choices equal to or more than the number of choices specified by Source variable

data.name: MSG_ALERT_COMBOBOXLIMIT
data.value: Input [(Auto)] or [1-1000] for the [No. of choices].

data.name: MSG_FILE_CANNOT_PROCESS
data.value: Selected file is invalid or cannot be processed

data.name: MSG_PATH_TOO_LONG
data.value: Destination Path or FileName is too long

data.name: MSO_LICENCE_FAILED
data.value: Execution failed as the MS Office license is not valid.

data.name: MS_OFFICE_LICENCE_ERR
data.value: Execution failed due to un-licenced MS Office

data.name: MTOS_ALERT_MSG_TEXTBOX
data.value: Item names must be 25 characters or less

data.name: MTOS_MA_TO_SA
data.value: Convert an MA source variable into a new SA variable

data.name: MULTI_CLUSTOR_ANALYSIS
data.value: Classify cases using non-hierarichal cluster analysis.

data.name: MULTI_CORRESPONDENCE_ANALYSIS
data.value: Analyze the correlation between multiple variables and display result in the map.

data.name: MULTI_CSPORTFOLIO_ANALYSIS
data.value: Search for product/service attributes highly correlated with general(consumer) satisfaction.

data.name: MULTI_CS_MSGBX_ONLY_ONE_VARIABLE_CAN_BE_SELECTED
data.value: Only one item can be selected

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_ANALYSIS
data.value: Factor Analysis searches for joint variations in response to unobserved latent variables

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_ANALYSIS_FOR_ANSWER_HEADING
data.value: Analysis for Answer types of SA(Single Answer) and N(Numeric Value) only

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_ASSIGN_SCORES_REVERSE_ORDER
data.value: Assign scores in reverse order of the choice numbers for analysis

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_FACTOR_TO_EXTRACTED
data.value: No. of Factors to be extracted

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_WITH_EIGN
data.value: Adopt factors with eign values over 1.0

data.name: MULTI_MAIN_MSGBX_EXECUTE_DATAPROCESSING
data.value: Execute the data processing or delete the new variable in the question setting.

data.name: MULTI_MAIN_MSGBX_NOTEXECUTED_SOMEDATA
data.value: Not executed some data processing entries to set new variables' value. Continue ?

data.name: MULTI_PSM_GRAPH_DISPLAY_RANGE
data.value: There are some parts that are not set in the graph display range.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_GRAPH_DISPLAY_RANGE_TOO_LIMITED
data.value: Please set the graph display range so that there is a difference of 4 or more.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_CHANGING_AN_ANSWERTYPE
data.value: Changing an answer type will initialize the set variables. Continue?

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_RESTRICTIONS_WILL_NOT_APPLIED
data.value: Restrictions will not be applied to the prices for which values are not set in valid value setting. Continue?

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_SET_NUMERIC_VALUE_EQUAL_TO
data.value: Set a numeric value equal to or more than 1 to 'scale interval'.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_SET_NUMERIC_VALUE_GREATER_ZERO
data.value: Set a numerical value equal to or greater than 0 for the valid value.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_SET_NUMERIC_VALUE_INGRAPH_DISPLAY
data.value: Set numeric values in graph display range.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_MSGBX_UPDATE_GRAPH_DISPLAY_RANGE
data.value: Update the graph display range and scale interval.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_SCALE_LESS_ZERO
data.value: Set a numeric value equal to or more than 1 to 'scale interval'.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_UPDATE_PRICE_RANGE
data.value: Update the price range, scale interval and valid values to display in graph.

data.name: MULTI_VARIATE_PROCESS_TYPE
data.value: Each Analysis requires data(Questions or Choices)designed For the analysis.

data.name: MW_ALERT_ALREADY_OPENED
data.value: File with same name is already opened

data.name: OUTPUT_SHEET_IS_NOT_SET
data.value: An output sheet is not set.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_KURT
data.value: Kurtosis of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because the Number of Valid Cases was equal to or less than 3 or the standard deviation is 0.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_MOD
data.value: Mode of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because all the cases are different.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_SKEW
data.value: Kurtosis of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because the Number of Valid Cases was equal to or less than 3 or the standard deviation is 0.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_STD_DEV
data.value: Standard deviation of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because the Number of Valid Cases was equal to or less than 1.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_STD_ERR
data.value: Standard error of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because the standard deviation cannot be calculated.

data.name: PSM_CANNOT_CALC_STASTICS_VARNCE
data.value: Variance of [ {0} ] variable: could not be calculated because the standard deviation cannot be calculated.

data.name: PSM_NO_DATA
data.value: Cannot execute because there are zero data.

data.name: PSM_NO_INTERSECTION
data.value: There is not intersections within the specified price range.

data.name: PSM_RETRY_AFTER_NARROW_RANGE
data.value: Narrow output range of the graph/chart and execute again

data.name: PSM_VLD_CASE_IS_ZERO
data.value: Cannot analyze because the Number of Valid Cases is zero.

data.name: QC3PARSE_ALERT_CONTAIN_INVALID_VARIABLE
data.value: This file contain invalid variable name

data.name: QC3PARSE_ALERT_CONTAIN_MULTI_SHEET
data.value: This file contains multivariate sheet and cannot be opened. Reset the multivariate sheet with Quick-CROSS3G and reopen it with QuickCross.

data.name: QC3PARSE_ALERT_NOT_CONTAIN_SAMPLEID
data.value: The name of first item is not SAMPLE ID

data.name: QC3PARSE_ALERT_UNEXPECTED
data.value: QC3 to QC4 migration failed, File may corrupted or unexpected error occured and please try other file

data.name: QCM_ALERT_FILEEXIST
data.value: The file specified in the QuickCROSS file already exists.Do you want to overwrite it?

data.name: QCM_ALERT_FILE_OPEN
data.value: Please close the file that is currently open.

data.name: QCM_CHOICE_MNDTRY_SAMA
data.value: Choices are mandatory for SA,MA answer types

data.name: QCM_CHOICE_NDFA_NOTACCPTD
data.value: Choices are not accepted for N,D,FA answer types

data.name: QCM_CHOICE_NMBROFCATGRY_NOTMATCH
data.value: Choices and Number of Category does not match

data.name: QCM_FILEEND_NOTSET_QLAYOUT
data.value: There is no FILEEND for Qlayout file.

data.name: QCM_FILEEND_NOTSET_QRAWDATA
data.value: There is no FILEEND for Qrawdata file.

data.name: QCM_FILENAME_MISMATCH
data.value: File name of Qlayout and Qrawdata does not match.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_NMBROFCATGRY
data.value: Invalid data in Number of Category

data.name: QCM_INVALID_NUMBROFQSTN
data.value: Invalid data in Number of Questions

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTNTYPE_SAPSARMACSAS
data.value: The number of questions column must be blank.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTN_ANSTYPE
data.value: The answer type fields in the matrix do not match.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTN_CATGRYNUMB
data.value: The number of categories column in the matrix does not match.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTN_QNMBR_QTYPE_NMBRQSTN
data.value: The number of questions exceeds the number of matrix items.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTN_SORT
data.value: The sorting display columns in the matrix do not match.

data.name: QCM_INVALID_SUBQSTN_WT
data.value: The WT columns in the matrix do not match.

data.name: QCM_ITEM_NOTMATCH
data.value: Items in Qlayout and Qrawdata do not match.

data.name: QCM_QSTNTYPE_ANSTYPE_NOTMATCH
data.value: Answer type and Question type does not match

data.name: QCM_SET_WT_SAMA
data.value: WT values ​​can only be set for SA and MA answer types.

data.name: QCM_SURVEY_NUMB_MISSING
data.value: Survey Number missing in Qlayout file.

data.name: QCM_SURVEY_TITLE_MISSING
data.value: Survey Title missing in Qlayout file.

data.name: QCM_ZERO_DATA
data.value: There is no data in selected data file

data.name: QCM_ZERO_QLAYOUT_DATA
data.value: There is no data in selected Qlayout file

data.name: QCM_ZERO_QRAWDATA
data.value: There is no data in selected Qrawdata file

data.name: QS_ALERT_ADD_SUBTOTAL_COUNT_NOT_SET
data.value: Is it OK to delete the answer data of the following variable? {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_ADD_SUBTOTAL_CRITERIA_NOT_SET
data.value: Sub total criteria is not set in cell {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_ADD_SUBTOTAL_NAME_NOT_SET
data.value: Sub total name is not set in cell {0}

data.name: QS_ANSWER_TYPE_RULE
QS_CHOICE_LINE_ERROR
data.value: Choice: a part of [] is not input.

data.name: QS_CONFM_ALERT_IMPAN_DELETE
data.value: Is it OK to delete the answer data of the following variable? {0}

data.name: QS_COPY_TOOLTIP
data.value: Copy an existing variable to create a new one.

data.name: QS_DELETE_CONFIRM2
data.value: Continuing with deletion will be Delete data processing entries related to a variable to be deleted. Restore the data back to state before processing. OK?

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING2
data.value: Delete data processing entries related variable to be deleted.

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING3
data.value: Delete the settings for the GT table of a variable to be deleted.

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING4
data.value: Delete the settings for the Cross tabulation of a variable to be deleted.

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING5
data.value: Delete the settings for the Summery table of a variable to be deleted.

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING6
data.value: Delete the settings for the FA list of a variable to be deleted.

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING7
data.value: Restore the data back to the state before processing.

data.name: QS_EDIT_RESET_CONFIRMATION
data.value: Restore the table title,question sentences,and choices back to the initial state.

data.name: QS_EDIT_TOOLTIP_BACK
data.value: Open the edit screen for previous variable.

data.name: QS_EDIT_TOOLTIP_NEXT
data.value: Open the edit screen for the next variable

data.name: QS_EXCEL_EXPORT_TOOLTIP
data.value: Export the questionnaire in Excel format.

data.name: QS_RAWDATA_ANSWER_TYPE_NOT_MATCH
QS_RENAME_VARIABLE_AUTOMATIC
data.value: Do you want to automatically rename the variable?

data.name: QS_SUBTOTAL_CONFIRMATION
data.value: You have to save the question before setting subtotal definition. Save now?

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_INCREMENT
data.value: A variable with the input name already exists. Do you want to automatically rename the variable?

data.name: RECODE_ALERT_MSG_COMBO_CATEGORY
data.value: Input [(Auto)] or [1-1000] for the [No. of choices].

data.name: RECODE_OVERLAPPING_CHOICE_WARNING_MESSAGE
data.value: The answer type will be changed to MA as there are overlapping choice.

data.name: REPORT_COLUMNS_COUNT_OVER_DETAIL_MESSAGE
data.value: Could not output all the columns in {1} table of '{0}'.

data.name: REPORT_COLUMNS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_NP_MESSAGE
data.value: Number of columns exceeded. Cannot output following N% tables.

data.name: REPORT_COLUMNS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_P_MESSAGE
data.value: Number of columns exceeded. Cannot output following % tables.

data.name: REPORT_COLUMNS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_SIGNIFICANCE_TEST_MESSAGE
data.value: Number of columns exceeded. Cannot output following significance test result.

data.name: REPORT_CRITERION_BETWEEN_NUMBER_FORMAT
data.value: equal to or more than {0}, equal to or less than {1}

data.name: REPORT_MARKING_LEGEND_SIGNIFICANCE_TEST_CAPTION
data.value: Test for the difference b/w breakdown cells Significance Level

data.name: REPORT_MARKING_LEGEND_SIGNIFICANCE_TEST_TO_WHOLE_CAPTION
data.value: Test for the difference with total α High Low

data.name: REPORT_OUTPUT_INDIVIDUAL_CROSS_SIGNIFICANCE_TEST_MESSAGE
data.value: Cannot output Significance test tables because {0}

data.name: REPORT_ROWS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_NP_MESSAGE
data.value: Could not output the following N% tables due to excess rows. {0}

data.name: REPORT_ROWS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_P_MESSAGE
data.value: Could not output the following % tables due to excess rows. {0}

data.name: REPORT_ROWS_COUNT_OVER_INDIVIDUAL_CROSSES_SIGNIFICANCE_TEST_MESSAGE
data.value: Could not output the following Significance test tables due to excess rows. {0}

data.name: REPORT_ROWS_COUNT_OVER_KEYWORD
data.value: Could not output {1} table of'{0}' due to excess rows.

data.name: SUBTOTAL_ALERT_MISSING_COLUMN
data.value: Choice: a part of [ {0} ] is not input

data.name: SUBTOTAL_EROOR_ALERT_EXCLA_START
data.value: [!] cannot be set other than at the start.

data.name: SUBTOTAL_RANGE_EXCEED
data.value: Set an integer in the range of [ {0} - {1} ].

data.name: TEXT_COUNT_PROCESSING_METHOD
data.value: Count the number of choices selected in an MA variable.

data.name: TEXT_GROUP_PROCESSING_METHOD
data.value: Calculate the maximum, minimum, average and sum value of a numeric variable.

data.name: TEXT_MTOS_PROCESSING_METHOD
data.value: Convert an MA variable into an SA variable.

data.name: THE_NO_OF_CHOICE_SHOULD_BE_EQUAL_LESS_THAN
data.value: The number of choices should be equal to or less than {0}.

data.name: THE_NO_OF_CHOICE_WILL_BE
data.value: The number of choices will be {0}.

data.name: TITLE_DP_CHECK_CROSS
data.value: Data processing Check Cross / Check List

data.name: TOOLTIP_CLASS_SET_CHOICE_LABELS
data.value: Automatically input choice labels according to the values set for the lower/upper limits.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_COPY
data.value: Copy selected process to create a new one.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_EDIT
data.value: Edit and revise the selected process.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_LEFT_ARROW
data.value: Move down processing order one step.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_ONOROFF
data.value: Switch on/off the execution of [Process setting].

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_RIGHT_ARROW
data.value: Move up processing order one step.

data.name: TOOLTIP_DP_UNDO
data.value: Restore the raw data before data processing.

data.name: TOOLTIP_EDITTAB
data.value: Change output order of cross tables, etc.

data.name: TOOLTIP_INTEGRATE_CRITERIA_VALUE
data.value: Set choices of the source variable to the criteria values.

data.name: TOOLTIP_INTEGRATE_SET_LABELS
data.value: Automatically set choice labels according to the condition of the values of the source variables.

data.name: TOOLTIP_QS_NEXT_BTN
data.value: Open the edit screen for next variable.

data.name: TOOLTIP_QS_PREVIOUS_BTN
data.value: Open the edit screen for previous variable.

data.name: TOOLTIP_SUMMARIZE_CHOICES
data.value: Set summarization like TOP2, BOTTOM2, etc.

data.name: TOOLTIP_WEIGHTBAG
data.value: Calculate weight values for sample weighting.

data.name: TOTAL_TABLE_TYPES_CANNOT_BE_SELECTED_ERROR
data.value: Total table types [GT-SA] and [GT-MA] cannot be selected.

data.name: TOTAL_TABLE_TYPES_CANNOT_BE_SELECTED_WARNING
data.value: Total table types [GT-SA] and [GT-MA] were included, so they were removed.

data.name: WEIGHT_BACK_NO_DATA_MESSAGE
data.value: Cannot set because of no data for [{0}]. Perform data processing.

data.name: QC3PARSE_ALERT_CONTAIN_INVALID_VARIABLE1
data.value: This file contain invalid variable name

data.name: WRONG_FILEPATH
data.value:
The file could not be accessed. Confirm one of the following:
• Confirm that the specified folder exists. • Confirm that the folder that contains the file is not read-only. • Confirm that the name of the specified file does not contain any of the following characters: <>? []: | * • Confirm that the file name and path name are not longer than 218 single-byte characters.

data.name: GT_INFO_ONOFALL
data.value: Switch on/off the tabulation of all items.

data.name: CA_HEADING_NOOF_CASES_USED_FOR_ANALYSIS
data.value: No. of Cases Used for Analysis

data.name: CROSS_COLUMN_PERCENTAGE_CANNOT_SET_THREEWAY
data.value: [3-Way XTab] and [Column %] are set at the same time.

data.name: CR_OPERATION_NOT_POSSIBLE_WITH_MERGED_CELLS
data.value: Operation not possible with merged cells.

data.name: CSP_ERRMSG_CANNOT_ANALYSE_VALID_CASES_IS_ZERO
data.value: Cannot analyze because the Number of Valid Cases is zero.

data.name: CSP_ERRMSG_FAILED_TO_CALCULATE_CORREL_COEFF
data.value: Failed to calculate a correlation coefficient. (The number of cases is less than 2 or the answers for a variable are the same for everyone, etc.)

data.name: ERR_MSG_INVALID_FA_ITEM
data.value: Invalid variable is set in row{0}

data.name: ERR_MSG_INVALID_ITEM
data.value: Invalid variable is set in row{0}

data.name: FILE_ALERDY_OPENED
data.value: File with same name is already opened.

data.name: FILE_READONLY_OPEN_MSG
data.value: '{0}' is locked for editing by '{1}'. Open as read-only?

data.name: FILE_READONLY_SAVE_WARNING_MSG
data.value: We can't save '{0}' because the file is read-only.To keep your changes you'ill need to save the file with new name or in a different location.

data.name: GT_AUTO_SETTNG_CONFIRM
data.value: All of current settings will be cleared. Continue?

data.name: MULTI_CORRESPONDANT_MSGBX_3OR_MORE
data.value: Specify 3 or more matrix analysis variables.

data.name: MULTI_CS_MSGBX_INDIVIDUAL_EVALUATION
data.value: The number of categories in Individual Evaluation variable {0} differs from other number of categories.

data.name: MULTI_CS_MSGBX_NUMB_OVERALL_EVALUATION_DONOT_MATCH
data.value: The number of choices for Overall Evaluation variable and Individual Evaluation variable do not match.

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_MSGBX_SET_3OR_MORE
data.value: Set 3 or more varible in Variable for use

data.name: MULTI_PSM_SCALE_DECIMAL
data.value: The decimal point cannot be set in the graph display range

data.name: MULTI_PSM_VALIDVALUE_DECIMAL
data.value: Decimal place cannot be set in the valid values.

data.name: QS_ALERT_ANIMPNEW_DATA_DELETE
data.value: Do you want to delete the data of following variables?

data.name: QS_ALERT_AN_IMP_ROW_DELETE
data.value: The answer data will be deleted and cannot be restored. Continue?

data.name: QS_ALERT_COUNTBASE_VALUE_NOT_SET
data.value: Count Base value is not set in cell {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_DELETE_ORG_QUESTION
data.value: Deleting existing variable is not allowed, Variable {0} is deleted.

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_COUNTBASE_FLAG
data.value: Error in Question settings Invalid Count Base in row {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_QUESTION_FLAG
data.value: Error in Question settings Invalid question flagin row {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_QUESTION_FLAG_EMPTY
data.value: Error in Question settings question flag is empty in row {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_QUESTION_TYPE
data.value: Error in Question settings Invalid question type in row {0}

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_VALUE
data.value: Error in Question settings invalid value in row {0} and column {1}

data.name: QS_ALERT_INVALID_VALUE_NOT_BETWEEN
data.value: Error in Question settings value is not between [1 - {0}]

data.name: QS_ALERT_WT
QS_CHOICE_VALUE_MORETHAN_COUNT

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_QUESTION
data.value: Error in Question settings Some error occured in row {0} and column {1}

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_SUBTOTAL
data.value: Subtotal settings not match in matrix type question in row{0} column{1}

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_SUBTOTAL_ADDSUB

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_SUBTOTAL_ADDSUBCOUNT
data.value: Number of subtotal not match in matrix type question in row{0} column{1}

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_SUBTOTAL_COUNT

data.name: QS_ERROR_IN_MATRIX_SUBTOTAL_COUNTBASE

data.name: QS_INTEGIRITY_VARIABLE_CHANGED
QS_INTEGRITY_CHOICE_COUNT_LESS
QS_INVALID_ANSWER_TYPE
QS_MATRIX_CHOICE_COUNT_NOT_EQUAL
data.value: Error in Question settings Category count is not same as above in row {0}

data.name: QS_MATRIX_CHOICE_NOT_EQUAL
data.value: Error in Question settings Category is not same as above in Row {0} and Column {1}

data.name: QS_MATRIX_QUESTION_LESS
QS_MATRIX_SORT_NOT_EQUAL

data.name: QS_MATRIX_TITLE_NOT_EQUAL

data.name: QS_MATRIX_WT_NOT_EQUAL
data.value: Score' setting in matrix question is inconsistent. Row {0} Column {1}

data.name: QS_MAX_NO_EXCEED
data.value: The number of questions has exceeded the upper limit.

data.name: QS_NO_VALUE_REQUIRED

data.name: QS_NULL_ANSWER_TYPE
QS_NUMBER_OF_CHOICE_NOT_SET
QS_NUMBER_OF_CHOICE_SET
QS_QUESTION_COUNT_INTEGER

data.name: QS_QUESTION_COUNT_MORETHAN_201
data.value: Question Count should be less than 201 in row {0} Question Type : {1}

data.name: QS_QUESTION_COUNT_NEGATIVE

data.name: QS_QUESTION_COUNT_SHOULD_EMPTY
QS_RAWDATA_CATEGORY_NOT_MATCH
QS_SCORE_INVALID_VALUE
data.value: Set a numeric value as a score

data.name: QS_SET_INTEGER
data.value: Error in Question settings Set and integer between [{0} - {1}] in row {2} and column {3}

data.name: QS_SHEET_CHANGE_ALERT
data.value: Data processing result may be incorrect. Please execute data processing again.

data.name: QS_TOP_BOX_TEXT
data.value: A question setting for the survey data. Can edit question sentences and choices or set new variables.

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_DUPLICATED
data.value: Error in Question settings Variable is duplicated in row {0}

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_LINEFEED_CHARACTER
data.value: CR,LF or CRLF cannot be used for variable name.

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_MAX_LENGTH
data.value: Specify New variable name with 25 or less characters.

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_MODE_SHEET_CHANGE
data.value: Sheet change is not allowed in variable edit mdoe

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_NULL_NOT_ALLOWED
data.value: Error in Question settings Variable is empty in row {0}

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_NUMBER_ONLY
data.value: Error Question Settings Cannot save a New variable name of numbers only.

data.name: QS_VARIABLE_SPECIAL_CHARACTER
data.value: Symbols cannot be used for New variable name.

data.name: REPORT_N_MATRIX_DESCRIPTION_KEYWORD
data.value: Matrix Table of Numerical Value Answer

data.name: SD_ALERT_MISMATCH_VARIABLES
data.value: Data is mismatched in following variable {0}

data.name: SD_ALERT_SAME_FILENAME
data.value: Please change file name and try again

data.name: SD_ERROR_FAILED
data.value: Sheet check failed Please choose other file

data.name: SET_NUMERIC_VALUE_RANGE
data.value: Set a numeric value. in Row {0} and sColum {1}

data.name: CSP_ERRMSG_1_VALIDCASE_FAILED_TO_CALCULATE_CORREL_COEFF
data.value: Failed to calculate a correlation coefficient. (The number of cases is less than 2 or the answers for a variable are the same for everyone, etc.)

data.name: GK_DESCRIPTION
data.value: To obtain the QC4 authorization key, send the generated system identification key to Macromill.

data.name: ADD_CHECKBOX_EXCLUDE
data.value: Exclude when all the source variables are [Excluded]

data.name: SPSS_RULE_MESSAGE
data.value: In line with SPSS format, following contents will be changed and output.

data.name: FACTOR_ROTATION_METHOD_NOTE
data.value: Note: For oblique rotation, adding the sum of squares for loading after rotation is not equal to total variance.

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrCr_Af_FactorSumSquares
data.value: Sums of Squared Loadings after Rotation

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrCr_Bf_FactorSumSquares
data.value: Sums of Squared Loadings after Factor Extraction

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrIn_BfFactorLodingMatCalcLim
data.value: The maximum number of iterations for factor extraction

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrIn_BfFactorLodingMatEps
data.value: Convergence Criteria for Factor Loading Matrices

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrIn_EigenCalcLim
data.value: The maximum number of iterations for Eigen decomposition

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrIn_FactorCount
data.value: Number of factors to be extracted

data.name: FACTOR_P_StrIn_RotationCalcLim
data.value: The maximum number of iterations for factor rotation

data.name: FACTOR_P_Str_EstimationUse2
data.value: for calculating a reduced correlation matrix.

data.name: MULTI_ALERT_DELETE_VARIABLE
data.value: Multivariate data of applicable variables will be deleted. OK?

data.name: QS_DELETE_WARNING_MULTIVARIATE
data.value: Multivariate data of applicable variables will be deleted.

data.name: MULTI_CORRESS_AXIS_ERROR_MSG
data.value: Specified dimension number is too great. Set a numeric value less than the number of specified matrix variables and the specified choice number.

data.name: MULTI_CORRES_AXIS_LESS_DIOMESION
data.value: Set numeric values equal to or less than [the number of dimensions] for the horizontal axis and the vertical axis of correspondence map.

data.name: MULTI_CORRES_DIOMENSION_EQUAL
data.value: Cannot set the same dimension for the horizontal axis and the vertical axis of correspondence map.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_GRAPH_ERROR
data.value: Please set the graph display range to lower limit <upper limit

data.name: MULTI_MAIN_EDIT_VARIABLE
data.value: [{0}] is a variable that does not exist.

data.name: MULTI_VARIABLE_NOTEXIST
data.value: [{0}]does not exist in the variable name Multivariate Sheet.

data.name: MULTI_CORRES_VALIDCASES_FEW
data.value: Cannot analyze because there are no valid data

data.name: MULTI_FACTOR_ERROR_ROTATION
data.value: Require two or more factors for factor rotation.

data.name: FILTER_SA_MA_INVALID
data.value: Criteria Variable: input of [{0}] is invalid. Set an integer in the range of [{1}].

data.name: MULTI_PSM_SCALE_INTERVAL_DECIMAL
data.value: Decimal point cannot be set in 'scale interval'.

data.name: MULTI_PSM_SCALE_NON_NUMERIC
data.value: Set a numeric value equal to or more than 1 to 'scale interval'.

data.name: PSM_CORRESS_TO_MANY
data.value: There are too many valid categories.

data.name: QC_WEB_WEIGHTBACK_EXCEPTION
data.value: The weight back setting is incorrect.

data.name: EX_DIFFERENCE_BETWEEN_DATASHEET_AND_MULTIVARIATE
data.value: Samples were deleted after executing multivariate analysis. Analysis results of the deleted samples would not be output.

data.name: OUTOFMEMORY_EXCEPTION_MESSAGE
data.value: There isn’t enough memory to complete this process. Try using less data or closing other applications, then re-execute the process.

data.name: MULTI_ITEM_DELETE_MSG
data.value: If you continue to delete, the multivariate data of the corresponding item will be deleted. The item to be deleted may be used in the following places . If you continue to delete, the following settings The corresponding item is deleted from . Data processing GT table creation Cross table / graph creation FA list creation Are you sure you want to delete?

data.name: IM_KEY_SELECTION_WARNING_MESSAGE
data.value: The key variable has not been specified. Do you want to continue processing?

data.name: FILE_READONLY_ATTRIBUTE_FILE_OPEN_MSG
data.value:
This file can not be saved. (e.g. already open in other window, not decompressed from ZIP, required write permission, etc.)
It will open in READ-ONLY mode

data.name: FACTOR_E10
data.value: Factor extraction aborted. At least one estimate of communality exceeded 1 during iterations.

data.name: FACTOR_E11
data.value: Interpretation and/or use of the results are not recommended.

data.name: IM_QLAYOUT_READ_TOOLTIP
data.value: When you execute Read Qlayout, previously set quesiton setings will be overwritten.

data.name: IM_QLAYOUT_READ_WARNING_MESSAGE1
data.value: Error in reading Qlayout. Contains information that cannot be set. Check the following row(s) of Qlayout file.

data.name: INVALID_FILENAME_START_SEMICOLEN
data.value: File names cannot begin with a semicolon ";".

data.name: ALERT_CULTURE
data.value: Please set Number formats of Windows to the default values for Regional format "English (United States)" or "Japanese (Japan)" before launching.
